# GitHub Copilot Instructions — VISION CORE

When assisting this repository:

- Do not generate full rewrites for critical files.
- Suggest minimal diffs.
- Preserve PASS GOLD enforcement.
- Preserve Aegis enforcement.
- Preserve OpenClaw → Scanner → Hermes ordering.
- Do not treat feedback as validated memory.
- Do not expose secrets, full private paths, or raw env content.
